```{r}
      if (nrow(perfect_pairs) > 0) {
        cat("     Perfectly correlated pairs:\n")
        seen_pairs <- character()
        for (i in seq_len(nrow(perfect_pairs))) {
          v1 <- rownames(cor_matrix)[perfect_pairs[i, 1]]
          v2 <- colnames(cor_matrix)[perfect_pairs[i, 2]]
          pair_key <- paste(sort(c(v1, v2)), collapse = "↔")
          if (!pair_key %in% seen_pairs) {
            cat(sprintf(
              "       • %s ↔ %s (r = %.4f — redundant as predictor: %s)\n",
              v1, v2,
              cor_matrix[perfect_pairs[i, 1], perfect_pairs[i, 2]], v2))
            redundant_predictors <- c(redundant_predictors, v2)
            seen_pairs <- c(seen_pairs, pair_key)
          }
        }
      }
      cat("     Skipping VIF due to perfect multicollinearity\n\n")
      NULL

    } else {
      vif_formula <- as.formula(
        paste(names(numeric_complete)[1], "~",
              paste(names(numeric_complete)[-1], collapse = " + ")))
      vif_model <- lm(vif_formula, data = numeric_complete)
      car::vif(vif_model)
    }
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("  ⚠️  VIF calculation failed:", conditionMessage(e), "\n\n")
    NULL
  })

  if (!is.null(vif_result)) {
    vif_df <- data.frame(
      variable = names(vif_result),
      VIF      = as.numeric(vif_result)
    ) %>% arrange(desc(VIF))

    cat("VIF RESULTS:\n")
    cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
    for (i in seq_len(nrow(vif_df))) {
      status <- if (vif_df$VIF[i] < 5) "✓" else
        if (vif_df$VIF[i] < 10) "⚠️" else "✗"
      cat(sprintf("  %s %2d. %-30s: VIF = %6.2f\n",
                  status, i, vif_df$variable[i], vif_df$VIF[i]))
    }
    high_vif <- vif_df %>% filter(VIF > 10)
    mod_vif  <- vif_df %>% filter(VIF >= 5 & VIF <= 10)
    low_vif  <- vif_df %>% filter(VIF < 5)
    cat(sprintf("\n  ✓ Low VIF (<5):        %3d variables\n", nrow(low_vif)))
    cat(sprintf("  ⚠️ Moderate VIF (5-10): %3d variables\n", nrow(mod_vif)))
    cat(sprintf("  ✗ High VIF (>10):      %3d variables\n\n", nrow(high_vif)))

    if (nrow(high_vif) > 0) {
      cat("⚠️  VARIABLES WITH HIGH VIF — CONSIDER REMOVING:\n")
      for (i in seq_len(nrow(high_vif)))
        cat(sprintf("  %2d. %-30s: VIF = %.2f\n",
                    i, high_vif$variable[i], high_vif$VIF[i]))
      cat("\n")
    }

    if (nrow(mod_vif) > 0) {
      cat("NOTE ON MODERATE VIF VARIABLES:\n")
      for (i in seq_len(nrow(mod_vif)))
        cat(sprintf("  %-30s: VIF = %.2f\n",
                    mod_vif$variable[i], mod_vif$VIF[i]))
      cat("  stop_wdl_exp_combined and wdl_symptom_count are correlated\n")
      cat("  by construction (symptom count determines combined score).\n")
      cat("  Both are complete variables — neither is imputed — and\n")
      cat("  stop_wdl_exp_combined has been zeroed as a predictor column\n")
      cat("  in Part D5. No action needed.\n\n")
    }

    write.csv(vif_df, "vif_analysis.csv", row.names = FALSE)
    cat("✓ Saved: vif_analysis.csv\n\n")
  }
} else {
  cat("ℹ️  Not enough complete numeric variables for VIF analysis\n\n")
}

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PART D: DEFINE VARIABLE TYPES FOR IMPUTATION
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PART D: DEFINING VARIABLE TYPES FOR IMPUTATION\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

# ── Explicit item vectors ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
benefit_items     <- c("benefit_1","benefit_4","benefit_5","benefit_6")
side_effect_items <- paste0("side_effects_", 1:4)
adl_items         <- paste0("adls_", 1:2)
dependence_items  <- paste0("dependence_", 1:3)
motivation_items  <- paste0("motivation_", 1:3)
capability_items  <- c("capability_1","capability")
desires_items     <- c("desires_1","desires_2")
hcp_items         <- c("inf_hcp_1","inf_hcp_3")

# All Likert-scale belief/COM-B items → PMM
likert_items <- c(
  benefit_items, side_effect_items, adl_items, dependence_items,
  motivation_items, capability_items, desires_items, hcp_items
)

# ── Continuous (PMM) ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
continuous_vars <- c(
  "age",
  "med_quant", "phq2_score", "osss_3_score",
  "n_physical_conditions", "n_ment_conditions", "n_sleep_conditions",
  "wdl_symptom_count",
  "bzra_daily_diazepam_eq", "bzra_weekly_diazepam_eq",
  "c_lengthofuse",
  likert_items,
  if (!is.null(analysis_vars$dbas))  analysis_vars$dbas  else character(),
  if (!is.null(analysis_vars$bfi))   analysis_vars$bfi   else character(),
  if (!is.null(analysis_vars$surps)) analysis_vars$surps else character(),
  if (!is.null(analysis_vars$ciss))  analysis_vars$ciss  else character()
)

# ── Binary (logreg) ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
binary_vars <- c("sex")

# ── Ordered categorical (polr) ────────────────────────────────────────────────
ordered_vars <- c(
  "education", "income", "employment", "driving_freq",
  "gen_health",
  "fall2",
  "stop_wdl_exp_combined",
  if (!is.null(analysis_vars$sleep_aids)) analysis_vars$sleep_aids
  else character()
)

# ── Unordered categorical (polyreg) ───────────────────────────────────────────
unordered_categorical <- c("prov_terr")

# Filter to variables present in df_imp
continuous_vars       <- continuous_vars[continuous_vars %in% names(df_imp)]
binary_vars           <- binary_vars[binary_vars %in% names(df_imp)]
ordered_vars          <- ordered_vars[ordered_vars %in% names(df_imp)]
unordered_categorical <- unordered_categorical[
  unordered_categorical %in% names(df_imp)]

# Check for unassigned variables
all_assigned <- c(continuous_vars, binary_vars,
                  ordered_vars, unordered_categorical)
unassigned   <- setdiff(names(df_imp), c(all_assigned, derived_vars))
if (length(unassigned) > 0) {
  cat("⚠️  UNASSIGNED VARIABLES (defaulting to mice auto-detect):\n")
  for (v in unassigned) cat("  •", v, "\n")
  cat("\n")
}

cat("VARIABLE TYPE ASSIGNMENT:\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
cat(sprintf("  Continuous / PMM (numeric + Likert): %d variables\n",
            length(continuous_vars)))
cat(sprintf("    Of which Likert belief/COM-B items: %d\n",
            sum(likert_items %in% continuous_vars)))
cat(sprintf("    Of which personality scale items:  %d\n",
            sum(c(analysis_vars$dbas, analysis_vars$bfi,
                  analysis_vars$surps, analysis_vars$ciss) %in%
                  continuous_vars)))
cat(sprintf("  Binary / logreg:                     %d variables\n",
            length(binary_vars)))
cat(sprintf("  Ordered categorical / polr:          %d variables\n",
            length(ordered_vars)))
cat(sprintf("    Includes: fall2 (0=none,1=minor,2=serious)\n"))
cat(sprintf("    Includes: stop_wdl_exp_combined (0-5 withdrawal severity)\n"))
cat(sprintf("  Unordered categorical / polyreg:     %d variables\n",
            length(unordered_categorical)))
cat(sprintf("  Total assigned:                      %d\n\n",
            length(continuous_vars) + length(binary_vars) +
              length(ordered_vars) + length(unordered_categorical)))

# ── Force all Likert and personality items to numeric ─────────────────────────
cat("FORCING LIKERT AND PERSONALITY ITEMS TO NUMERIC:\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
cat("  Rationale: Likert items treated as continuous (PMM).\n")
cat("  Forcing to integer prevents accidental ordered-factor encoding\n")
cat("  which triggers polr and sparse-level separation warnings.\n\n")

scale_vars_all <- c(
  likert_items,
  if (!is.null(analysis_vars$dbas))  analysis_vars$dbas  else character(),
  if (!is.null(analysis_vars$bfi))   analysis_vars$bfi   else character(),
  if (!is.null(analysis_vars$surps)) analysis_vars$surps else character(),
  if (!is.null(analysis_vars$ciss))  analysis_vars$ciss  else character()
)
scale_vars_all <- scale_vars_all[scale_vars_all %in% names(df_imp)]

n_converted <- 0L
n_already   <- 0L
for (var in scale_vars_all) {
  if (!is.numeric(df_imp[[var]])) {
    df_imp[[var]] <- as.integer(df_imp[[var]])
    n_converted   <- n_converted + 1L
  } else {
    n_already <- n_already + 1L
  }
}
cat(sprintf("  ✓ Converted to integer: %d items\n", n_converted))
cat(sprintf("  ✓ Already numeric:      %d items\n", n_already))
cat(sprintf("  Scales: DBAS (%d), BFI (%d), SURPS (%d), CISS (%d),\n",
            sum(analysis_vars$dbas  %in% scale_vars_all),
            sum(analysis_vars$bfi   %in% scale_vars_all),
            sum(analysis_vars$surps %in% scale_vars_all),
            sum(analysis_vars$ciss  %in% scale_vars_all)))
cat(sprintf("          Belief/COM-B Likert items (%d)\n\n",
            sum(likert_items %in% scale_vars_all)))

# ── Convert remaining variables to proper types ───────────────────────────────
cat("Converting remaining variables to proper types...\n")

for (var in continuous_vars)
  if (var %in% names(df_imp) && !is.numeric(df_imp[[var]]))
    df_imp[[var]] <- as.numeric(as.character(df_imp[[var]]))

for (var in binary_vars)
  if (var %in% names(df_imp))
    df_imp[[var]] <- as.numeric(df_imp[[var]])

for (var in ordered_vars)
  if (var %in% names(df_imp) && !is.ordered(df_imp[[var]]))
    df_imp[[var]] <- factor(df_imp[[var]], ordered = TRUE)

for (var in unordered_categorical)
  if (var %in% names(df_imp) &&
      (!is.factor(df_imp[[var]]) || is.ordered(df_imp[[var]])))
    df_imp[[var]] <- factor(df_imp[[var]], ordered = FALSE)

cat("✓ Variable type conversion complete\n\n")

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Set up mice methods and predictor matrix
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

init   <- mice(df_imp, maxit = 0, print = FALSE)
method <- init$method

# ── quickpred() ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# mincor = 0.07 selected to achieve 20-25 predictors per model.
# mincor = 0.10 gave avg 14.5; mincor = 0.05 gave avg 28.6; 0.07 gives 22.3.
# minpuc = 0.10 retained to exclude block-missing within-scale pairs.
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("Building predictor matrix with quickpred()...\n")
cat("  mincor = 0.07 (minimum |r| to include as predictor)\n")
cat("  minpuc = 0.10 (minimum proportion of usable cases — excludes\n")
cat("           block-missing within-scale pairs, Van Buuren 2018 §6.3)\n")
cat("  Target: 20–25 predictors per model\n\n")

pred <- quickpred(df_imp, mincor = 0.07, minpuc = 0.10)

# Remove near-perfectly correlated predictors (|r| > 0.95)
cat("Removing near-perfectly correlated predictors (|r| > 0.95)...\n")
numeric_vars_for_cor <- names(df_imp)[sapply(df_imp, is.numeric)]
if (length(numeric_vars_for_cor) >= 2) {
  cor_matrix     <- cor(df_imp[, numeric_vars_for_cor],
                        use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
  high_cor_pairs <- which(abs(cor_matrix) > 0.95 & abs(cor_matrix) < 1,
                          arr.ind = TRUE)
  n_zeroed <- 0L
  if (nrow(high_cor_pairs) > 0) {
    for (k in seq_len(nrow(high_cor_pairs))) {
      row_var <- rownames(cor_matrix)[high_cor_pairs[k, 1]]
      col_var <- colnames(cor_matrix)[high_cor_pairs[k, 2]]
      if (col_var %in% colnames(pred)) {
        pred[row_var, col_var] <- 0
        n_zeroed <- n_zeroed + 1L
      }
    }
    cat(sprintf("  Zeroed %d high-correlation predictor slots\n\n", n_zeroed))
  } else {
    cat("  ✓ No near-perfect correlations found\n\n")
  }
}

# Remove perfectly correlated redundant predictors from Part C
if (length(redundant_predictors) > 0) {
  cat("Removing perfectly correlated redundant predictors...\n")
  for (var in redundant_predictors) {
    if (var %in% colnames(pred)) {
      pred[, var] <- 0
      cat(sprintf("  ✓ Zeroed column: %s (r = 1 — not used as predictor)\n",
                  var))
    }
  }
  cat("\n")
}

# Predictor matrix density
n_possible  <- nrow(pred) * (ncol(pred) - 1)
n_used      <- sum(pred)
pct_used    <- round(100 * n_used / n_possible, 1)
avg_per_var <- round(n_used / nrow(pred), 1)

cat("PREDICTOR MATRIX SUMMARY (after quickpred):\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
cat(sprintf("  Possible predictor slots: %d\n", n_possible))
cat(sprintf("  Active predictor slots:   %d (%.1f%%)\n", n_used, pct_used))
cat(sprintf("  Avg predictors per model: %.1f\n", avg_per_var))
if (avg_per_var > 25)
  cat("  ⚠️  Average > 25 — consider raising mincor to 0.10\n")
if (avg_per_var < 20)
  cat("  ⚠️  Average < 20 — consider lowering mincor further\n")
cat("\n")

# Remove sparse categorical variables from predictor matrix
cat("Checking sparse variables flagged in Part B...\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
if (length(separation_vars) > 0) {
  for (var in separation_vars) {
    if (var %in% colnames(pred)) {
      pred[, var] <- 0
      cat(sprintf("  ✓ Zeroed predictor column: %s (sparse factor)\n", var))
    }
  }
  cat("\n")
} else {
  cat("  ✓ No sparse factor variables to remove\n\n")
}

# Zero out problematic vars as predictors
for (var in problematic_vars)
  if (var %in% colnames(pred)) pred[, var] <- 0

prob_in_pred <- problematic_vars[problematic_vars %in% colnames(pred)]
if (length(prob_in_pred) > 0) {
  cat(sprintf("  ✓ Problematic variables zeroed as predictors: %s\n\n",
              paste(prob_in_pred, collapse = ", ")))
} else {
  cat("  ✓ No additional problematic variables in predictor matrix\n\n")
}

n_used_final      <- sum(pred)
avg_per_var_final <- round(n_used_final / nrow(pred), 1)
cat(sprintf("FINAL predictor matrix: %d active slots, avg %.1f predictors/model\n\n",
            n_used_final, avg_per_var_final))

# ── Assign imputation methods ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
for (var in continuous_vars)
  if (var %in% names(method) && var %in% vars_with_missing)
    method[var] <- "pmm"
for (var in binary_vars)
  if (var %in% names(method) && var %in% vars_with_missing)
    method[var] <- "logreg"
for (var in ordered_vars)
  if (var %in% names(method) && var %in% vars_with_missing)
    method[var] <- "polr"
for (var in unordered_categorical)
  if (var %in% names(method) && var %in% vars_with_missing)
    method[var] <- "polyreg"
for (var in problematic_vars)
  if (var %in% names(method)) method[var] <- ""

# ── bzra_weekly_diazepam_eq: exclude from imputation ─────────────────────────
# This variable has 10 NAs (confirmed users with missing dose/freq data),
# the same 10 NAs as bzra_daily_diazepam_eq. Because weekly = daily × 7
# by construction, it must not be imputed independently — imputing it
# separately would break the mathematical relationship with the daily variable.
# Method is set to "" so mice skips it entirely. The 10 NAs will be filled
# post-imputation in Chunk 8 Part E using: weekly = daily_imputed × 7.
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
if ("bzra_weekly_diazepam_eq" %in% names(method)) {
  method["bzra_weekly_diazepam_eq"] <- ""
  cat("  ✓ bzra_weekly_diazepam_eq: method set to ''\n")
  cat("    (derived from daily × 7 — recalculated in Chunk 8 Part E)\n\n")
}

cat("METHOD SUMMARY:\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
cat("  PMM:        ", sum(method == "pmm"),     "\n")
cat("  Logreg:     ", sum(method == "logreg"),  "\n")
cat("  Polr:       ", sum(method == "polr"),    "\n")
cat("  Polyreg:    ", sum(method == "polyreg"), "\n")
cat("  Not imputed:", sum(method == ""),        "\n\n")

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PART D5: LOGGED EVENTS DIAGNOSTIC & TARGETED REDUCTION
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PART D5: LOGGED EVENTS DIAGNOSTIC & TARGETED REDUCTION\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

parse_logged_events <- function(mids_obj) {
  le <- mids_obj$loggedEvents
  if (is.null(le) || nrow(le) == 0) return(NULL)
  le$event_type <- dplyr::case_when(
    grepl("singular|rank.deficient|computationally singular",
          le$out, ignore.case = TRUE)                        ~ "singular_system",
    grepl("perfect predictor",  le$out, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "perfect_predictor",
    grepl("constant",           le$out, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "constant_predictor",
    le$meth %in% c("polr","polyreg") & le$out != ""         ~ "polr_separation",
    le$meth %in% c("polr","polyreg") & le$out == ""         ~ "polr_fit_failure",
    le$out != ""                                             ~ "dropped_predictor",
    TRUE                                                     ~ "other"
  )
  le
}

cat("PROBE 1: Baseline — running m=1, maxit=5 to surface logged events...\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")

probe1 <- tryCatch(
  mice(df_imp, m = 1, maxit = 5, method = method,
       predictorMatrix = pred, seed = 99, printFlag = FALSE,
       ridge = 1e-3),
  error = function(e) {
    cat("  ⚠️  Probe failed:", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
    NULL
  }
)

n_events_before <- 0L

if (!is.null(probe1)) {
  le1 <- parse_logged_events(probe1)

  if (is.null(le1)) {
    cat("  ✓ No logged events in baseline probe\n\n")
  } else {
    n_events_before <- nrow(le1)
    cat(sprintf("  ⚠️  %d logged events detected\n\n", n_events_before))

    type_summary <- le1 %>%
      dplyr::count(event_type, name = "n") %>%
      dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(n))
    cat("  Event breakdown by type:\n")
    for (r in seq_len(nrow(type_summary)))
      cat(sprintf("    %-30s: %d\n",
                  type_summary$event_type[r], type_summary$n[r]))
    cat("\n")

    dep_summary <- le1 %>%
      dplyr::count(dep, event_type, name = "n") %>%
      dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(n)) %>%
      head(20)
    cat("  Top affected target variables:\n")
    for (r in seq_len(nrow(dep_summary)))
      cat(sprintf("    %-30s [%-20s]: %d events\n",
                  dep_summary$dep[r], dep_summary$event_type[r],
                  dep_summary$n[r]))
    cat("\n")

    out_summary <- le1 %>%
      dplyr::filter(out != "") %>%
      dplyr::count(out, name = "n") %>%
      dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(n)) %>%
      head(20)
    if (nrow(out_summary) > 0) {
      cat("  Most frequently problematic predictors:\n")
      for (r in seq_len(nrow(out_summary)))
        cat(sprintf("    %-30s: dropped/flagged %d times\n",
                    out_summary$out[r], out_summary$n[r]))
      cat("\n")
    }

    write.csv(le1, "logged_events_baseline.csv", row.names = FALSE)
    cat("  ✓ Saved: logged_events_baseline.csv\n\n")

    # FIX A: Remove problematic predictor columns
    n_fix_a <- 0L
    singular_preds_raw <- le1 %>%
      dplyr::filter(event_type %in% c("singular_system", "perfect_predictor",
                                       "constant_predictor",
                                       "dropped_predictor")) %>%
      dplyr::filter(out != "") %>%
      dplyr::count(out, name = "n") %>%
      dplyr::filter(n >= 3) %>%
      dplyr::pull(out)

    singular_preds <- unique(
      sub("\\.(L|Q|C|(\\^[0-9]+))$", "", singular_preds_raw))

    if (length(singular_preds) > 0) {
      cat("  FIX A: Zeroing frequently-problematic predictor columns (≥3 events)\n")
      for (var in singular_preds) {
        if (var %in% colnames(pred)) {
          pred[, var] <- 0
          n_fix_a <- n_fix_a + 1L
          flagged_as <- singular_preds_raw[
            sub("\\.(L|Q|C|(\\^[0-9]+))$", "",
                singular_preds_raw) == var]
          cat(sprintf("    ✓ Zeroed: %-30s (flagged as: %s)\n",
                      var, paste(unique(flagged_as), collapse = ", ")))
        }
      }
      cat("\n")
    } else {
      cat("  FIX A: No columns meet ≥3 events threshold\n\n")
    }

    # FIX B: Switch polr failures to PMM
    polr_failures <- le1 %>%
      dplyr::filter(event_type %in% c("polr_fit_failure",
                                       "polr_separation")) %>%
      dplyr::pull(dep) %>%
      unique()

    n_fix_b <- 0L
    if (length(polr_failures) > 0) {
      cat("  FIX B: Switching polr failures to PMM\n")
      for (var in polr_failures) {
        if (var %in% names(method) && method[var] == "polr") {
          method[var] <- "pmm"
          n_fix_b <- n_fix_b + 1L
          cat(sprintf("    ✓ %s: polr → pmm\n", var))
        }
      }
      cat("\n")
    } else {
      cat("  FIX B: No polr-specific failures detected\n\n")
    }

    # PROBE 2: verify improvement
    if (n_fix_a > 0 || n_fix_b > 0) {
      cat("  PROBE 2: Re-running after fixes...\n")
      probe2 <- tryCatch(
        mice(df_imp, m = 1, maxit = 5, method = method,
             predictorMatrix = pred, seed = 99, printFlag = FALSE,
             ridge = 1e-3),
        error = function(e) {
          cat("  ⚠️  Probe 2 failed:", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
          NULL
        }
      )
      if (!is.null(probe2)) {
        le2            <- parse_logged_events(probe2)
        n_events_after <- if (is.null(le2)) 0L else nrow(le2)
        cat(sprintf(
          "\n  LOGGED EVENTS: %d → %d  (reduction: %d, %.0f%%)\n\n",
          n_events_before, n_events_after,
          n_events_before - n_events_after,
          100 * (n_events_before - n_events_after) /
            max(n_events_before, 1)))
        if (!is.null(le2) && nrow(le2) > 0) {
          remaining_types <- le2 %>%
            dplyr::count(event_type, name = "n") %>%
            dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(n))
          cat("  Remaining events after fixes:\n")
          for (r in seq_len(nrow(remaining_types)))
            cat(sprintf("    %-30s: %d\n",
                        remaining_types$event_type[r],
                        remaining_types$n[r]))
          cat("\n")
          write.csv(le2, "logged_events_after_fixes.csv", row.names = FALSE)
          cat("  ✓ Saved: logged_events_after_fixes.csv\n\n")
        }
      }
    } else {
      cat("  ℹ️  No structural fixes applied (ridge = 1e-3 active)\n\n")
    }
  }
} else {
  cat("  ℹ️  Probe skipped — ridge = 1e-3 applied in all imputations\n\n")
}

# Updated summary after D5
n_used_final      <- sum(pred)
avg_per_var_final <- round(n_used_final / nrow(pred), 1)

cat("UPDATED METHOD SUMMARY (after D5 fixes):\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
cat("  PMM:        ", sum(method == "pmm"),     "\n")
cat("  Logreg:     ", sum(method == "logreg"),  "\n")
cat("  Polr:       ", sum(method == "polr"),    "\n")
cat("  Polyreg:    ", sum(method == "polyreg"), "\n")
cat("  Not imputed:", sum(method == ""),        "\n")
cat(sprintf("  Predictor matrix: %d active slots, avg %.1f/model\n\n",
            n_used_final, avg_per_var_final))

cat("NOTE: ridge = 1e-3 applied in all subsequent mice() calls\n")
cat("  (van Buuren, 2018 §6.4.2 — stabilises near-singular systems)\n\n")

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PART E: STATISTICAL DERIVATION OF m — VON HIPPEL (2020)
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PART E: STATISTICAL DERIVATION OF m (NUMBER OF IMPUTATIONS)\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

cat("METHOD: Von Hippel (2020) two-stage FMI-based quadratic rule\n")
cat("  DOI: 10.1177/0049124117747303\n\n")

cat("STAGE 1: Pilot imputation with m=20, maxit=20\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
cat("  Running pilot imputation...\n")

pilot_imp <- NULL

pilot_imp <- tryCatch({
  mice(df_imp, m = 20, maxit = 20, method = method,
       predictorMatrix = pred, seed = 12345, printFlag = FALSE,
       ridge = 1e-3)
}, error = function(e) {
  cat("  ⚠️  Pilot imputation failed:", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
  NULL
})

if (!is.null(pilot_imp)) {
  cat("  ✓ Pilot imputation complete\n\n")

  max_miss_var <- names(which.max(missing_pct))
  max_miss_pct <- max(missing_pct)

  cat("STAGE 2: FMI estimation\n")
  cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
  cat("  Variable:", max_miss_var,
      "(highest missingness:", round(max_miss_pct, 1), "%)\n\n")

  available_preds <- names(df_imp)[
    names(df_imp) != max_miss_var &
      sapply(df_imp, is.numeric) &
      colSums(is.na(df_imp)) == 0
  ]
  available_preds <- head(available_preds, 10)

  fmi_result <- tryCatch({
    if (length(available_preds) >= 2) {
      fmi_formula <- as.formula(
        paste(max_miss_var, "~",
              paste(available_preds, collapse = " + ")))

      fits <- lapply(seq_len(pilot_imp$m), function(i) {
        lm(fmi_formula, data = mice::complete(pilot_imp, action = i))
      })
      pooled_fit <- mice::pool(as.mira(fits))
      cat("  ✓ Model pooled across imputations\n\n")

      list(
        m_standard     = how_many_imputations(pooled_fit),
        m_conservative = how_many_imputations(pooled_fit, cv = 0.01),
        success        = TRUE
      )
    } else {
      cat("  ⚠️  Insufficient complete numeric predictors (need ≥ 2, found",
          length(available_preds), ")\n")
      list(success = FALSE)
    }
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("  ⚠️  FMI calculation failed:", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
    list(success = FALSE)
  })

  if (isTRUE(fmi_result$success)) {
    cat("FMI-BASED m CALCULATION:\n")
    cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
    cat(sprintf("  m for CV(SE) = 0.05 (5%% precision):  %d\n",
                fmi_result$m_standard))
    cat(sprintf("  m for CV(SE) = 0.01 (1%% precision):  %d\n",
                fmi_result$m_conservative))
    cat("\n")

    m_white_floor <- ceiling(max_miss_pct)
    m_vonhippel   <- fmi_result$m_standard
    optimal_m     <- max(m_vonhippel, m_white_floor, 20)
    if (optimal_m > 100) {
      cat(sprintf("  Initial calculation: %d (capped at 100)\n", optimal_m))
      optimal_m <- 100
    }

    cat("DECISION:\n")
    cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
    cat(sprintf("  Von Hippel (2020) quadratic rule:    m = %d\n",
                m_vonhippel))
    cat(sprintf("  White et al. (2011) floor (≥%% miss): m = %d\n",
                m_white_floor))
    cat(sprintf("  Minimum recommended:                 m = 20\n"))
    cat(sprintf("  → SELECTED m = %d\n\n", optimal_m))

  } else {
    cat("Falling back to White et al. (2011) rule\n\n")
    m_white_floor <- ceiling(max(missing_pct))
    optimal_m     <- max(m_white_floor, 20)
    if (optimal_m > 100) optimal_m <- 100
    cat(sprintf("  → SELECTED m = %d\n\n", optimal_m))
  }

} else {
  cat("  Pilot failed — using missingness-based fallback\n\n")
  m_white_floor <- ceiling(max(missing_pct))
  optimal_m     <- max(m_white_floor, 20)
  if (optimal_m > 100) optimal_m <- 100
  cat(sprintf("  → SELECTED m = %d (White et al., 2011)\n\n", optimal_m))
}

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PART F: EMPIRICAL MAXIT DETERMINATION
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PART F: EMPIRICAL MAXIT DETERMINATION\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

cat("METHOD: Gelman-Rubin PSRF < 1.1 across maxit = 10, 20, 30, 40\n")
cat("  Pilot m = 5 (convergence independent of m)\n\n")

maxit_candidates    <- c(10, 20, 30, 40)
convergence_results <- data.frame(
  maxit        = maxit_candidates,
  max_psrf     = NA_real_,
  mean_psrf    = NA_real_,
  n_above_1.1  = NA_integer_,
  converged    = NA,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

cat("Running convergence experiment...\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n")

pilot_imps <- list()

for (i in seq_along(maxit_candidates)) {
  maxit_test <- maxit_candidates[i]
  cat(sprintf("Testing maxit = %d ...\n", maxit_test))

  pilot_imp_test <- tryCatch({
    mice(df_imp, m = 5, maxit = maxit_test, method = method,
         predictorMatrix = pred, seed = 12345, printFlag = FALSE,
         ridge = 1e-3)
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat(sprintf("  ⚠️  Failed: %s\n", conditionMessage(e)))
    NULL
  })

  if (!is.null(pilot_imp_test)) {
    pilot_imps[[as.character(maxit_test)]] <- pilot_imp_test

    psrf_result <- tryCatch({
      if (!requireNamespace("coda", quietly = TRUE))
        stop("coda package required")

      cm <- pilot_imp_test$chainMean
      if (is.null(cm) || length(dim(cm)) != 3)
        stop("chainMean has unexpected structure")

      n_imp_vars <- dim(cm)[1]
      n_chains   <- dim(cm)[3]

      cat(sprintf(
        "  Computing PSRF [%d vars × %d iters × %d chains]...\n",
        n_imp_vars, dim(cm)[2], n_chains))

      if (n_chains < 2)
        stop("Need m ≥ 2 chains for Gelman-Rubin")

      psrf_vec <- numeric(n_imp_vars)
      for (v in seq_len(n_imp_vars)) {
        chain_list <- lapply(seq_len(n_chains), function(j) {
          vals <- cm[v, , j]
          if (all(is.na(vals)) ||
              var(vals, na.rm = TRUE) < 1e-15) return(NULL)
          coda::mcmc(vals)
        })
        chain_list <- Filter(Negate(is.null), chain_list)
        if (length(chain_list) < 2) { psrf_vec[v] <- 1.0; next }
        gd <- tryCatch(
          coda::gelman.diag(coda::mcmc.list(chain_list),
                            autoburnin = FALSE,
                            multivariate = FALSE),
          error = function(e) NULL
        )
        psrf_vec[v] <- if (!is.null(gd)) gd$psrf[1, 1] else NA_real_
      }

      psrf_vec <- psrf_vec[!is.na(psrf_vec) & is.finite(psrf_vec)]
      list(
        success   = TRUE,
        max_psrf  = round(max(psrf_vec),  4),
        mean_psrf = round(mean(psrf_vec), 4),
        n_above   = sum(psrf_vec > 1.1),
        n_vars    = length(psrf_vec),
        converged = max(psrf_vec) < 1.1
      )
    }, error = function(e) {
      list(success = FALSE, error_msg = conditionMessage(e))
    })

    if (isTRUE(psrf_result$success)) {
      convergence_results$max_psrf[i]    <- psrf_result$max_psrf
      convergence_results$mean_psrf[i]   <- psrf_result$mean_psrf
      convergence_results$n_above_1.1[i] <- psrf_result$n_above
      convergence_results$converged[i]   <- psrf_result$converged
      status <- if (psrf_result$converged) "✓ CONVERGED" else
        "✗ NOT CONVERGED"
      cat(sprintf(
        "  %s | Max PSRF = %.4f | Mean = %.4f | N > 1.1: %d/%d\n",
        status, psrf_result$max_psrf, psrf_result$mean_psrf,
        psrf_result$n_above, psrf_result$n_vars))
    } else {
      cat(sprintf("  ⚠️  PSRF failed: %s\n", psrf_result$error_msg))
      n_le <- if (!is.null(pilot_imp_test$loggedEvents))
        nrow(pilot_imp_test$loggedEvents) else 0
      convergence_results$converged[i] <- (n_le == 0)
    }
  } else {
    cat("  ✗ FAILED\n")
  }
  cat("\n")
}

cat("CONVERGENCE EXPERIMENT RESULTS:\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
print(convergence_results[, c("maxit","max_psrf","mean_psrf",
                               "n_above_1.1","converged")],
      row.names = FALSE)
cat("\n")

converged_rows <- convergence_results[
  !is.na(convergence_results$converged) &
    convergence_results$converged == TRUE, ]

if (nrow(converged_rows) > 0) {
  optimal_maxit <- min(converged_rows$maxit)
  cat(sprintf("✓ Convergence first achieved at maxit = %d\n", optimal_maxit))
} else {
  cat("⚠️  No tested maxit achieved convergence — using maxit = 40\n")
  optimal_maxit <- 40
}
cat(sprintf("\n→ SELECTED maxit = %d\n\n", optimal_maxit))

selected_pilot <- pilot_imps[[as.character(optimal_maxit)]]
if (!is.null(selected_pilot)) {
  tryCatch({
    pdf("convergence_trace_plots_pilot.pdf", width = 12, height = 8)
    plot(selected_pilot,
         main = paste0("Pilot Trace Plots — maxit = ",
                       optimal_maxit, " (m=5)"))
    dev.off()
    cat("✓ Saved: convergence_trace_plots_pilot.pdf\n\n")
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("  ⚠️  Could not save trace plots:", conditionMessage(e), "\n\n")
  })
}

write.csv(convergence_results, "convergence_experiment_results.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)
cat("✓ Saved: convergence_experiment_results.csv\n\n")

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PART G: SAVE OPTIMIZATION RESULTS
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PART G: SAVING OPTIMIZATION RESULTS\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

saveRDS(df_imp, "df_imputation_ready.rds")
cat("✓ Saved: df_imputation_ready.rds\n")

imputation_parameters <- list(
  optimal_m     = optimal_m,
  optimal_maxit = optimal_maxit,
  outcome       = outcome,
  optimal_m_justification = paste0(
    "Von Hippel (2020) two-stage FMI quadratic rule. ",
    "Pilot m=20. FMI from highest-missing variable (",
    names(which.max(missing_pct)), ", ",
    round(max(missing_pct), 1), "% missing). ",
    "Floor: White et al. (2011) m >= % missing = ",
    ceiling(max(missing_pct)), "."
  ),
  optimal_maxit_justification = paste0(
    "Empirical convergence experiment: m=5 at maxit=10,20,30,40. ",
    "Gelman-Rubin PSRF < 1.1. Convergence at maxit=", optimal_maxit, "."
  ),
  convergence_experiment           = convergence_results,
  method                           = method,
  predictor_matrix                 = pred,
  variable_types = list(
    continuous  = continuous_vars,
    binary      = binary_vars,
    ordered     = ordered_vars,
    unordered   = unordered_categorical
  ),
  likert_items_as_pmm              = likert_items,
  excluded_variables               = c(outcome, problematic_vars),
  derived_variables_to_recalculate = derived_vars,
  redundant_predictors_zeroed      = redundant_predictors,
  ridge_penalty                    = 1e-3,
  logged_events_before_fixes       = n_events_before,
  n_observations                   = nrow(df_imp),
  n_variables                      = ncol(df_imp),
  n_vars_to_impute                 = sum(method != ""),
  max_missingness_pct              = max(missing_pct),
  avg_missingness_pct              = mean(missing_pct[missing_pct > 0]),
  mincor_used                      = 0.07,
  minpuc_used                      = 0.10,
  reverse_coding_done = list(
    bfi   = analysis_vars$bfi_reversed,
    surps = analysis_vars$surps_reversed
  )
)

saveRDS(imputation_parameters, "imputation_parameters_optimized.rds")
cat("✓ Saved: imputation_parameters_optimized.rds\n\n")

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PART H: FINAL SUMMARY
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("DIAGNOSTICS COMPLETE — SUMMARY\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

cat("STATISTICALLY-DERIVED PARAMETERS:\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
cat(sprintf("  m     = %d  (Von Hippel, 2020)\n", optimal_m))
cat(sprintf("  maxit = %d  (Gelman-Rubin PSRF convergence experiment)\n",
            optimal_maxit))
cat(sprintf("  Variables to impute: %d\n", sum(method != "")))
cat(sprintf("  Observations:        %d\n\n", nrow(df_imp)))

cat("IMPUTATION METHOD BREAKDOWN:\n")
cat(sprintf("  PMM (continuous + all Likert items): %d\n",
            sum(method == "pmm")))
cat(sprintf("    Likert belief/COM-B items:          %d\n",
            sum(likert_items %in% names(method)[method == "pmm"])))
cat(sprintf("    Personality scale items:            %d\n",
            sum(scale_vars_all %in% names(method)[method == "pmm"])))
cat(sprintf("  Logreg (binary):                     %d\n",
            sum(method == "logreg")))
cat(sprintf("  Polr (ordered):                      %d\n",
            sum(method == "polr")))
cat(sprintf("    Includes: fall2, stop_wdl_exp_combined,\n"))
cat(sprintf("              education, income, employment,\n"))
cat(sprintf("              driving_freq, gen_health, sleep aids\n"))
cat(sprintf("  Polyreg (unordered):                 %d\n",
            sum(method == "polyreg")))
cat(sprintf("  Not imputed:                         %d\n\n",
            sum(method == "")))

cat("PREDICTOR MATRIX:\n")
cat(sprintf("  mincor = 0.07, minpuc = 0.10\n"))
cat(sprintf("  Final avg predictors/model: %.1f\n\n", avg_per_var_final))

cat("KEY DECISIONS:\n")
cat("  • Outcome (freq_dich) excluded from imputation dataset\n")
cat("  • All Likert items (belief/COM-B, 5-point) → PMM\n")
cat("  • wdl_symptom_count (0-4 count) → PMM\n")
cat("  • fall2 (0=none, 1=minor, 2=serious) → polr\n")
cat("  • stop_wdl_exp_combined (0-5) → polr\n")
cat("  • prov_terr → polyreg\n")
cat("  • n_health_conditions removed (derived — recalculated post-imputation)\n")
cat("  • bzra_weekly_diazepam_eq excluded from imputation (derived: daily × 7)\n")
cat("  • mincor = 0.07 (avg 22.3 predictors/model)\n")
cat("  • ridge = 1e-3 applied to all mice() calls\n\n")

cat("CONVERGENCE EXPERIMENT:\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
print(convergence_results[, c("maxit","max_psrf","mean_psrf",
                               "n_above_1.1","converged")],
      row.names = FALSE)
cat(sprintf("\n  → Convergence at maxit = %d\n\n", optimal_maxit))

cat("KEY CITATIONS:\n")
cat("  • Von Hippel (2020) Sociol Methods Res 49(3):699-718  [m]\n")
cat("  • White et al. (2011) Stat Med 30(4):377-399          [m floor]\n")
cat("  • Gelman & Rubin (1992) Stat Sci 7(4):457-472         [maxit]\n")
cat("  • Brooks & Gelman (1998) J Comp Graph Stat 7(4):434   [maxit]\n")
cat("  • Van Buuren (2018) Flexible Imputation (2nd ed.)      [both]\n\n")

cat("FILES CREATED:\n")
cat("  1. df_imputation_ready.rds\n")
cat("  2. imputation_parameters_optimized.rds\n")
cat("  3. pre_imputation_missingness_summary.csv\n")
cat("  4. convergence_experiment_results.csv\n")
cat("  5. convergence_trace_plots_pilot.pdf\n")
cat("  6. logged_events_baseline.csv\n")
cat("  7. logged_events_after_fixes.csv  (if fixes applied)\n")
if (file.exists("vif_analysis.csv"))
  cat("  8. vif_analysis.csv\n")
cat("\n")

cat("NEXT STEP: Proceed to Chunk 8 (Multiple Imputation)\n\n")

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("✓ PRE-IMPUTATION DIAGNOSTICS COMPLETE\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")
```



## Imputation
```{r}
#==============================================================================
# CHUNK 8: MULTIPLE IMPUTATION
#==============================================================================
# Purpose: Perform multiple imputation using MICE with parameters optimized
#          in Chunk 7, then run comprehensive statistical verification
# Outputs: Imputed datasets + full diagnostic report
#
# CHUNK 7 PARAMETERS CARRIED FORWARD:
#   m     = 30                (Von Hippel, 2020 FMI quadratic rule)
#   maxit = 20                (Gelman-Rubin PSRF convergence experiment)
#   ridge = 1e-3              (stability stabiliser, van Buuren §6.4.2)
#   mincor = 0.07, minpuc = 0.10  (predictor matrix, avg 22.3 predictors/model)
#   stop_wdl_exp_combined     (zeroed as predictor — cubic contrast singularity)
#   bzra_weekly_diazepam_eq   (excluded from imputation — derived: daily × 7)
#   outcome = freq_dich       (excluded from imputation, added back in Part F)
#==============================================================================

library(mice)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(coda)

cat("\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("MULTIPLE IMPUTATION\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

# Load optimized parameters from Chunk 7
if (!file.exists("df_imputation_ready.rds") ||
    !file.exists("imputation_parameters_optimized.rds")) {
  stop("ERROR: Required files not found. Please run Chunk 7 first.")
}

df_imp     <- readRDS("df_imputation_ready.rds")
imp_params <- readRDS("imputation_parameters_optimized.rds")

cat("✓ Loaded imputation-ready dataset\n")
cat("  Dimensions:", nrow(df_imp), "rows ×", ncol(df_imp), "columns\n\n")

cat("✓ Loaded optimized parameters from Chunk 7\n")
cat("  m     =", imp_params$optimal_m, "\n")
cat("  maxit =", imp_params$optimal_maxit, "\n")
cat("  ridge =", imp_params$ridge_penalty, "\n")
cat("  Variables to impute:", imp_params$n_vars_to_impute, "\n\n")

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PART A: RUNNING MULTIPLE IMPUTATION
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PART A: RUNNING MULTIPLE IMPUTATION\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

cat("IMPUTATION PARAMETERS:\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
cat("  Number of imputations (m):", imp_params$optimal_m, "\n")
cat("  Iterations (maxit):       ", imp_params$optimal_maxit, "\n")
cat("  Ridge penalty:            ", imp_params$ridge_penalty, "\n")
cat("  Variables to impute:      ", imp_params$n_vars_to_impute, "\n")
cat("  Imputation methods:\n")
cat("    • PMM:    ", sum(imp_params$method == "pmm"),     "variables\n")
cat("    • Logreg: ", sum(imp_params$method == "logreg"),  "variables\n")
cat("    • Polr:   ", sum(imp_params$method == "polr"),    "variables\n")
cat("    • Polyreg:", sum(imp_params$method == "polyreg"), "variables\n\n")

cat("JUSTIFICATION:\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
cat("  m:     ", imp_params$optimal_m_justification,    "\n\n")
cat("  maxit: ", imp_params$optimal_maxit_justification, "\n\n")

cat("CHUNK 7 ADJUSTMENTS APPLIED:\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")

if (!is.null(imp_params$redundant_predictors_zeroed) &&
    length(imp_params$redundant_predictors_zeroed) > 0) {
  for (v in imp_params$redundant_predictors_zeroed)
    cat(sprintf("  • %-35s zeroed as predictor (r = 1)\n", v))
}

# Report polr → PMM switches
polr_to_pmm <- names(imp_params$method)[
  imp_params$method == "pmm" &
    names(imp_params$method) %in% imp_params$variable_types$ordered
]
if (length(polr_to_pmm) > 0) {
  cat(sprintf("  • %d ordered vars switched polr → PMM (Fix B, Chunk 7 D5):\n",
              length(polr_to_pmm)))
  for (v in polr_to_pmm) cat(sprintf("      %s\n", v))
} else {
  cat("  • No polr → PMM switches (Fix B: no polr failures in Chunk 7)\n")
}

cat("  • bzra_weekly_diazepam_eq excluded from imputation\n")
cat("    (derived variable: weekly = daily × 7, recalculated in Part E)\n")
cat("  • stop_wdl_exp_combined zeroed as predictor\n")
cat("    (cubic polynomial contrast caused singularity — fixed in Chunk 7 D5)\n\n")

# Run MICE
cat("Starting imputation...\n")
cat("This may take several minutes...\n\n")

start_time <- Sys.time()

imp_final <- mice(
  data            = df_imp,
  m               = imp_params$optimal_m,
  maxit           = imp_params$optimal_maxit,
  method          = imp_params$method,
  predictorMatrix = imp_params$predictor_matrix,
  ridge           = imp_params$ridge_penalty,
  seed            = 12345,
  printFlag       = TRUE
)

end_time     <- Sys.time()
elapsed_time <- difftime(end_time, start_time, units = "mins")

cat("\n✓ Imputation complete!\n")
cat("  Time elapsed:", round(as.numeric(elapsed_time), 2), "minutes\n\n")

# Logged events check
n_logged <- if (!is.null(imp_final$loggedEvents))
  nrow(imp_final$loggedEvents) else 0L

if (n_logged > 0) {
  cat("⚠️  LOGGED EVENTS DURING FINAL IMPUTATION:\n")
  cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
  cat("  Total events:", n_logged, "\n")
  event_summary <- table(imp_final$loggedEvents$out)
  cat("  Event types:\n")
  for (event in names(event_summary))
    cat("    •", event, ":", event_summary[event], "times\n")
  cat("\n  First 10 events:\n")
  print(head(imp_final$loggedEvents, 10))
  write.csv(imp_final$loggedEvents, "imputation_logged_events.csv",
            row.names = FALSE)
  cat("  ✓ Saved: imputation_logged_events.csv\n\n")
} else {
  cat("✓ No logged events — imputation completed without issues\n\n")
}

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PART B: CONVERGENCE DIAGNOSTICS
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PART B: CONVERGENCE DIAGNOSTICS\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

# ── B1. Gelman-Rubin PSRF ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("B1. Gelman-Rubin PSRF on final imputation\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
cat("  Computing PSRF from chainMean [vars × maxit × m]...\n")

psrf_final <- tryCatch({

  cm         <- imp_final$chainMean
  n_imp_vars <- dim(cm)[1]
  n_iter     <- dim(cm)[2]
  n_chains   <- dim(cm)[3]

  psrf_vec  <- numeric(n_imp_vars)
  var_names <- dimnames(cm)[[1]]

  for (v in seq_len(n_imp_vars)) {
    chain_list <- lapply(seq_len(n_chains), function(j) {
      vals <- cm[v, , j]
      if (all(is.na(vals)) || var(vals, na.rm = TRUE) < 1e-15) return(NULL)
      coda::mcmc(vals)
    })
    chain_list <- Filter(Negate(is.null), chain_list)
    if (length(chain_list) < 2) { psrf_vec[v] <- 1.0; next }
    gd <- tryCatch(
      coda::gelman.diag(coda::mcmc.list(chain_list),
                        autoburnin = FALSE, multivariate = FALSE),
      error = function(e) NULL)
    psrf_vec[v] <- if (!is.null(gd)) gd$psrf[1, 1] else NA_real_
  }

  setNames(psrf_vec, var_names)

}, error = function(e) {
  cat("  ⚠️  PSRF calculation failed:", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
  NULL
})

if (!is.null(psrf_final)) {
  psrf_clean <- psrf_final[!is.na(psrf_final) & is.finite(psrf_final)]
  max_psrf   <- max(psrf_clean)
  mean_psrf  <- mean(psrf_clean)
  n_above    <- sum(psrf_clean > 1.1)
  converged  <- max_psrf < 1.1

  cat(sprintf("  Max PSRF:    %.4f %s\n", max_psrf,
              if (max_psrf < 1.1) "✓" else "⚠️"))
  cat(sprintf("  Mean PSRF:   %.4f\n", mean_psrf))
  cat(sprintf("  N > 1.1:     %d / %d\n", n_above, length(psrf_clean)))

  if (converged) {
    cat("  ✓ CONVERGED — all chains settled (PSRF < 1.1)\n\n")
  } else {
    cat("  ⚠️  NOT FULLY CONVERGED — consider increasing maxit\n\n")
    high_psrf_vars <- sort(psrf_clean[psrf_clean > 1.1], decreasing = TRUE)
    cat("  Variables with PSRF > 1.1:\n")
    for (v in seq_along(high_psrf_vars))
      cat(sprintf("    %2d. %-35s PSRF = %.4f\n",
                  v, names(high_psrf_vars)[v], high_psrf_vars[v]))
    cat("\n")
  }

  psrf_df <- data.frame(
    variable  = names(psrf_clean),
    psrf      = round(psrf_clean, 4),
    converged = psrf_clean < 1.1
  ) %>% arrange(desc(psrf))

  write.csv(psrf_df, "final_imputation_psrf.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  cat("  ✓ Saved: final_imputation_psrf.csv\n\n")
}

# ── B2. Trace plots ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("B2. Trace plots\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")

vars_to_plot <- c(
  "age", "education", "income",
  "phq2_score", "osss_3_score", "med_quant",
  "ciss11", "ciss21", "surps17", "surps23_r",
  "side_effects_1", "dependence_1",
  "motivation_1", "desires_1", "capability",
  "benefit_1", "adls_1", "inf_hcp_1"
)
vars_to_plot <- vars_to_plot[
  vars_to_plot %in% names(imp_params$method[imp_params$method != ""])]

cat("  Plotting", length(vars_to_plot), "representative variables...\n")
tryCatch({
  pdf("convergence_trace_plots_final.pdf", width = 14, height = 10)
  plot(imp_final, y = vars_to_plot,
       main = paste0("Final Imputation Trace Plots (m=",
                     imp_params$optimal_m, ", maxit=",
                     imp_params$optimal_maxit, ")"))
  dev.off()
  cat("  ✓ Saved: convergence_trace_plots_final.pdf\n")
  cat("    → Chains should intermingle freely with no directional trends\n\n")
}, error = function(e)
  cat("  ⚠️  Trace plot failed:", conditionMessage(e), "\n\n"))

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PART C: DISTRIBUTION DIAGNOSTICS
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PART C: DISTRIBUTION DIAGNOSTICS\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

cat("PURPOSE: Verify imputed values have plausible distributions.\n")
cat("  Red = observed, Blue = imputed. Distributions should be similar\n")
cat("  under MAR; systematic differences are not necessarily wrong but\n")
cat("  warrant scrutiny (van Buuren, 2018 §6.6).\n\n")

continuous_to_plot <- vars_to_plot[
  vars_to_plot %in% imp_params$variable_types$continuous]

if (length(continuous_to_plot) > 0) {
  vars_for_density <- head(continuous_to_plot, 8)
  cat("  Density plots for:", paste(vars_for_density, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  tryCatch({
    pdf("imputation_density_plots.pdf", width = 14, height = 10)
    print(densityplot(imp_final,
                      as.formula(paste("~",
                                       paste(vars_for_density,
                                             collapse = " + ")))))
    dev.off()
    cat("  ✓ Saved: imputation_density_plots.pdf\n\n")
  }, error = function(e)
    cat("  ⚠️  Density plot failed:", conditionMessage(e), "\n\n"))
} else {
  cat("  No continuous variables available from plot list\n\n")
}

ordered_to_plot <- vars_to_plot[
  vars_to_plot %in% imp_params$variable_types$ordered]
if (length(ordered_to_plot) > 0) {
  vars_for_strip <- head(ordered_to_plot, 6)
  tryCatch({
    pdf("imputation_stripplots.pdf", width = 12, height = 8)
    print(stripplot(imp_final,
                    as.formula(paste("~",
                                     paste(vars_for_strip, collapse = " + "))),
                    pch = 20, cex = 0.6))
    dev.off()
    cat("  ✓ Saved: imputation_stripplots.pdf\n\n")
  }, error = function(e)
    cat("  ⚠️  Stripplot failed:", conditionMessage(e), "\n\n"))
}

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PART D: STATISTICAL VERIFICATION
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PART D: STATISTICAL VERIFICATION\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

# Extract all imputed datasets
all_imp_list <- lapply(seq_len(imp_params$optimal_m),
                       function(i) mice::complete(imp_final, i))

# ── D1. Completeness check ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("D1. Completeness check\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
cat("  PURPOSE: Confirm every imputed variable has zero missing values\n")
cat("           in every completed dataset.\n")
cat("  NOTE: bzra_weekly_diazepam_eq is excluded — it is derived\n")
cat("        (daily × 7) and recalculated in Part E.\n\n")

imp_vars <- names(imp_params$method[imp_params$method != ""])
# Exclude bzra_weekly_diazepam_eq — intentionally not imputed
imp_vars <- imp_vars[imp_vars != "bzra_weekly_diazepam_eq"]

completeness_fails <- character()
for (i in seq_along(all_imp_list)) {
  d <- all_imp_list[[i]]
  for (var in imp_vars) {
    if (var %in% names(d) && anyNA(d[[var]]))
      completeness_fails <- c(completeness_fails,
                              sprintf("  Imputation %d, variable: %s", i, var))
  }
}

if (length(completeness_fails) == 0) {
  cat("  ✓ PASS — All", length(imp_vars), "imputed variables are complete",
      "across all", imp_params$optimal_m, "datasets\n\n")
} else {
  cat(sprintf("  ✗ FAIL — %d incompleteness issues detected:\n",
              length(completeness_fails)))
  for (msg in head(completeness_fails, 20)) cat("   ", msg, "\n")
  cat("\n")
}

# ── D2. Range preservation check (PMM) ───────────────────────────────────────
cat("D2. Range preservation check (PMM variables)\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
cat("  PURPOSE: PMM imputes by matching observed donors, so imputed\n")
cat("           values MUST lie within the observed range.\n\n")

pmm_vars <- names(imp_params$method[imp_params$method == "pmm"])
pmm_vars <- pmm_vars[pmm_vars %in% names(df_imp)]
pmm_vars <- pmm_vars[sapply(df_imp[pmm_vars], is.numeric)]
# Exclude bzra_weekly_diazepam_eq — not imputed
pmm_vars <- pmm_vars[pmm_vars != "bzra_weekly_diazepam_eq"]

range_fails   <- character()
range_summary <- data.frame()

for (var in pmm_vars) {
  if (!var %in% names(df_imp)) next
  obs_vals <- df_imp[[var]][!is.na(df_imp[[var]])]
  if (length(obs_vals) == 0) next
  obs_min <- min(obs_vals)
  obs_max <- max(obs_vals)

  all_imp_vals <- unlist(lapply(all_imp_list, function(d) {
    orig_na <- is.na(df_imp[[var]])
    if (sum(orig_na) == 0) return(NULL)
    d[[var]][orig_na]
  }))

  if (length(all_imp_vals) == 0) next

  # Remove NAs before range check
  all_imp_vals <- all_imp_vals[!is.na(all_imp_vals)]
  if (length(all_imp_vals) == 0) next

  imp_min      <- min(all_imp_vals)
  imp_max      <- max(all_imp_vals)
  out_of_range <- sum(all_imp_vals < obs_min | all_imp_vals > obs_max,
                      na.rm = TRUE)

  range_summary <- rbind(range_summary, data.frame(
    variable       = var,
    obs_min        = obs_min,
    obs_max        = obs_max,
    imp_min        = imp_min,
    imp_max        = imp_max,
    n_out_of_range = out_of_range
  ))

  if (out_of_range > 0)
    range_fails <- c(range_fails,
                     sprintf("%-35s obs [%.1f, %.1f]  imp [%.1f, %.1f]  n_OOB=%d",
                             var, obs_min, obs_max,
                             imp_min, imp_max, out_of_range))
}

if (length(range_fails) == 0) {
  cat("  ✓ PASS — All PMM imputed values lie within observed ranges\n\n")
} else {
  cat(sprintf("  ⚠️  %d PMM variables have out-of-range imputed values:\n",
              length(range_fails)))
  for (msg in range_fails) cat("    ", msg, "\n")
  cat("\n")
}

# ── D3. Mean / SD comparison (observed vs imputed) ───────────────────────────
cat("D3. Observed vs imputed mean / SD comparison\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
cat("  PURPOSE: Under MAR the imputed and observed distributions\n")
cat("           should be broadly similar. Large |SMD| > 0.5 flags\n")
cat("           potential MNAR bias or miscoded variables.\n\n")

vars_for_qc <- names(imp_params$method[imp_params$method == "pmm"])
vars_for_qc <- vars_for_qc[vars_for_qc %in% names(df_imp)]
vars_for_qc <- vars_for_qc[sapply(df_imp[vars_for_qc], is.numeric)]
vars_for_qc <- vars_for_qc[vars_for_qc != "bzra_weekly_diazepam_eq"]
vars_for_qc <- vars_for_qc[
  colSums(is.na(df_imp[, vars_for_qc, drop = FALSE])) > 0]

quality_df <- data.frame()

for (var in vars_for_qc) {
  obs_vals <- df_imp[[var]][!is.na(df_imp[[var]])]
  if (length(obs_vals) < 5) next

  orig_na <- is.na(df_imp[[var]])
  if (sum(orig_na) == 0) next

  imp_vals <- unlist(lapply(all_imp_list, function(d) d[[var]][orig_na]))
  imp_vals <- imp_vals[!is.na(imp_vals)]
  if (length(imp_vals) == 0) next

  obs_mean  <- mean(obs_vals);   obs_sd  <- sd(obs_vals)
  imp_mean  <- mean(imp_vals);   imp_sd  <- sd(imp_vals)
  pooled_sd <- sqrt((obs_sd^2 + imp_sd^2) / 2)
  smd       <- if (pooled_sd > 0) (imp_mean - obs_mean) / pooled_sd else 0

  quality_df <- rbind(quality_df, data.frame(
    variable  = var,
    n_missing = sum(orig_na),
    obs_mean  = round(obs_mean, 3),
    obs_sd    = round(obs_sd,   3),
    imp_mean  = round(imp_mean, 3),
    imp_sd    = round(imp_sd,   3),
    mean_diff = round(imp_mean - obs_mean, 3),
    sd_ratio  = round(imp_sd / obs_sd,     3),
    abs_smd   = round(abs(smd),            3),
    flag      = if (abs(smd) > 0.5) "⚠️ REVIEW" else "✓"
  ))
}

if (nrow(quality_df) > 0) {
  flagged <- quality_df[quality_df$flag == "⚠️ REVIEW", ]
  ok      <- quality_df[quality_df$flag == "✓", ]

  cat(sprintf("  Variables assessed: %d\n", nrow(quality_df)))
  cat(sprintf("  ✓ Acceptable (|SMD| ≤ 0.5): %d\n", nrow(ok)))
  cat(sprintf("  ⚠️  Review (|SMD| > 0.5):    %d\n\n", nrow(flagged)))

  if (nrow(flagged) > 0) {
    cat("  FLAGGED VARIABLES:\n")
    print(flagged[, c("variable","n_missing","obs_mean","imp_mean",
                      "obs_sd","imp_sd","abs_smd")],
          row.names = FALSE, digits = 3)
    cat("\n")
  }

  cat("  SUMMARY STATISTICS:\n")
  cat(sprintf("    Median |SMD|:    %.3f\n", median(quality_df$abs_smd)))
  cat(sprintf("    Max |SMD|:       %.3f\n", max(quality_df$abs_smd)))
  cat(sprintf("    Median SD ratio: %.3f\n", median(quality_df$sd_ratio)))
  cat(sprintf("    Max SD ratio:    %.3f\n\n", max(quality_df$sd_ratio)))

  write.csv(quality_df, "imputation_quality_assessment.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  cat("  ✓ Saved: imputation_quality_assessment.csv\n\n")
}

# ── D4. Between-imputation variance (RIV) ─────────────────────────────────────
cat("D4. Between-imputation variance stability\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
cat("  PURPOSE: Rubin's rules decompose variance into within (W) and\n")
cat("           between (B) components. RIV = B/W. If B >> W for many\n")
cat("           variables, m may be too small or chains have not mixed.\n\n")

riv_df <- data.frame()

for (var in vars_for_qc[vars_for_qc %in% names(df_imp)]) {
  orig_na <- is.na(df_imp[[var]])
  if (sum(orig_na) < 5) next

  imp_means <- sapply(all_imp_list,
                      function(d) mean(d[[var]][orig_na], na.rm = TRUE))
  imp_vars  <- sapply(all_imp_list,
                      function(d) var(d[[var]][orig_na],  na.rm = TRUE))

  W   <- mean(imp_vars)
  B   <- var(imp_means)
  RIV <- if (W > 0) B / W else NA_real_

  riv_df <- rbind(riv_df, data.frame(
    variable = var,
    W        = round(W,   4),
    B        = round(B,   4),
    RIV      = round(RIV, 4),
    flag     = if (!is.na(RIV) && RIV > 1.0) "⚠️ HIGH B" else "✓"
  ))
}

if (nrow(riv_df) > 0) {
  flagged_riv <- riv_df[!is.na(riv_df$flag) & riv_df$flag == "⚠️ HIGH B", ]
  cat(sprintf("  Variables assessed: %d\n", nrow(riv_df)))
  cat(sprintf("  ✓ Stable (RIV ≤ 1.0): %d\n",
              nrow(riv_df) - nrow(flagged_riv)))
  cat(sprintf("  ⚠️  High B/W (RIV > 1): %d\n", nrow(flagged_riv)))
  cat(sprintf("  Median RIV: %.4f\n", median(riv_df$RIV, na.rm = TRUE)))
  cat(sprintf("  Max RIV:    %.4f\n\n", max(riv_df$RIV, na.rm = TRUE)))

  if (nrow(flagged_riv) > 0) {
    cat("  HIGH RIV VARIABLES (B > W — consider increasing m):\n")
    print(flagged_riv %>% arrange(desc(RIV)) %>% head(10),
          row.names = FALSE)
    cat("\n")
  }

  write.csv(riv_df %>% arrange(desc(RIV)),
            "imputation_variance_decomposition.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  cat("  ✓ Saved: imputation_variance_decomposition.csv\n\n")
}

# ── D5. FMI per variable ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("D5. Fraction of Missing Information (FMI) per variable\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
cat("  PURPOSE: FMI quantifies how much variance is attributable\n")
cat("           to missingness. High FMI (> 0.5) means estimates\n")
cat("           are heavily influenced by the imputation model.\n\n")

fmi_df <- data.frame()

for (var in vars_for_qc[vars_for_qc %in% names(df_imp)]) {
  orig_na <- is.na(df_imp[[var]])
  if (sum(orig_na) < 5) next

  imp_means <- sapply(all_imp_list,
                      function(d) mean(d[[var]][orig_na], na.rm = TRUE))
  imp_vars  <- sapply(all_imp_list,
                      function(d) var(d[[var]][orig_na],  na.rm = TRUE))

  m     <- length(imp_means)
  W     <- mean(imp_vars)
  B     <- var(imp_means)
  T_var <- W + B + B / m
  FMI   <- if (T_var > 0) (B + B / m) / T_var else NA_real_

  fmi_df <- rbind(fmi_df, data.frame(
    variable    = var,
    pct_missing = round(100 * sum(orig_na) / nrow(df_imp), 1),
    FMI         = round(FMI, 3),
    flag        = if (!is.na(FMI) && FMI > 0.5) "⚠️ HIGH" else "✓"
  ))
}

if (nrow(fmi_df) > 0) {
  high_fmi <- fmi_df[!is.na(fmi_df$flag) & fmi_df$flag == "⚠️ HIGH", ]
  cat(sprintf("  Variables assessed: %d\n", nrow(fmi_df)))
  cat(sprintf("  Median FMI: %.3f\n", median(fmi_df$FMI, na.rm = TRUE)))
  cat(sprintf("  Max FMI:    %.3f\n", max(fmi_df$FMI, na.rm = TRUE)))
  cat(sprintf("  High FMI (> 0.5): %d variables\n\n", nrow(high_fmi)))

  cat("  TOP 15 VARIABLES BY FMI:\n")
  print(fmi_df %>% arrange(desc(FMI)) %>% head(15) %>%
          select(variable, pct_missing, FMI, flag),
        row.names = FALSE)
  cat("\n")

  write.csv(fmi_df %>% arrange(desc(FMI)),
            "imputation_fmi_per_variable.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  cat("  ✓ Saved: imputation_fmi_per_variable.csv\n\n")
}

# ── D6. Categorical distribution preservation ─────────────────────────────────
cat("D6. Categorical distribution preservation\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
cat("  PURPOSE: For ordered variables, check that imputed category\n")
cat("           proportions are plausible relative to observed.\n\n")

ordered_imp_vars <- names(imp_params$method[
  imp_params$method %in% c("polr", "pmm") &
    names(imp_params$method) %in% imp_params$variable_types$ordered
])
ordered_imp_vars <- ordered_imp_vars[
  ordered_imp_vars %in% names(df_imp) &
    sapply(df_imp[ordered_imp_vars], function(x) sum(is.na(x))) > 0
]

cat_check_df <- data.frame()

for (var in ordered_imp_vars) {
  orig_na  <- is.na(df_imp[[var]])
  obs_vals <- df_imp[[var]][!orig_na]
  if (length(obs_vals) == 0) next

  imp_vals <- unlist(lapply(all_imp_list, function(d) d[[var]][orig_na]))

  obs_props <- prop.table(table(obs_vals))
  imp_props <- prop.table(table(imp_vals))
  all_levs  <- union(names(obs_props), names(imp_props))

  max_diff <- max(abs(
    sapply(all_levs, function(lv)
      (if (lv %in% names(imp_props)) imp_props[lv] else 0) -
        (if (lv %in% names(obs_props)) obs_props[lv] else 0))
  ))

  cat_check_df <- rbind(cat_check_df, data.frame(
    variable      = var,
    n_missing     = sum(orig_na),
    n_levels      = length(all_levs),
    max_prop_diff = round(max_diff, 3),
    flag          = if (max_diff > 0.2) "⚠️ REVIEW" else "✓"
  ))
}

if (nrow(cat_check_df) > 0) {
  flagged_cat <- cat_check_df[cat_check_df$flag == "⚠️ REVIEW", ]
  cat(sprintf("  Ordered variables assessed: %d\n", nrow(cat_check_df)))
  cat(sprintf("  ✓ Proportions stable (max diff ≤ 0.20): %d\n",
              nrow(cat_check_df) - nrow(flagged_cat)))
  cat(sprintf("  ⚠️  Large proportion shift (> 0.20):      %d\n\n",
              nrow(flagged_cat)))
  if (nrow(flagged_cat) > 0) {
    cat("  FLAGGED VARIABLES:\n")
    print(flagged_cat, row.names = FALSE)
    cat("\n")
  }
  write.csv(cat_check_df, "imputation_categorical_check.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  cat("  ✓ Saved: imputation_categorical_check.csv\n\n")
} else {
  cat("  No ordered variables with missingness to check\n\n")
}

# ── D7. Intra-scale correlation preservation ──────────────────────────────────
cat("D7. Intra-scale correlation preservation\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
cat("  PURPOSE: Items within the same scale should remain highly\n")
cat("           correlated after imputation. A large r drop (> 0.1)\n")
cat("           suggests the imputation broke the latent structure.\n\n")

scale_pairs <- list(
  CISS  = paste0("ciss", 1:21),
  SURPS = c("surps1_r","surps2","surps3","surps4_r","surps5","surps6",
            "surps7_r","surps8","surps9","surps10","surps11","surps12",
            "surps13_r","surps14","surps15","surps16","surps17","surps18",
            "surps19","surps20_r","surps21","surps22","surps23_r"),
  DBAS  = c("dbas1", paste0("dbas_", 2:16)),
  BFI   = c("reserved_r","trusting","lazy_r","relaxed_r","few_interests_r",
            "outgoing","find_fault_r","thorough","nervous","imagination")
)

cor_check_df <- data.frame()

for (scale_name in names(scale_pairs)) {
  items <- scale_pairs[[scale_name]]
  items <- items[items %in% names(df_imp)]
  if (length(items) < 3) next

  obs_cc <- df_imp[complete.cases(df_imp[, items]), items]
  if (nrow(obs_cc) < 30) next
  obs_cor_mat <- cor(obs_cc, use = "complete.obs")
  obs_cor     <- mean(abs(obs_cor_mat[upper.tri(obs_cor_mat)]))

  imp_cors <- sapply(all_imp_list, function(d) {
    c_mat <- cor(d[, items], use = "complete.obs")
    mean(abs(c_mat[upper.tri(c_mat)]))
  })
  imp_cor  <- mean(imp_cors)
  cor_drop <- obs_cor - imp_cor

  cor_check_df <- rbind(cor_check_df, data.frame(
    scale      = scale_name,
    n_items    = length(items),
    obs_mean_r = round(obs_cor,  3),
    imp_mean_r = round(imp_cor,  3),
    r_drop     = round(cor_drop, 3),
    flag       = if (cor_drop > 0.1) "⚠️ DROP" else "✓"
  ))
}

if (nrow(cor_check_df) > 0) {
  cat("  Scale-level correlation summary:\n")
  print(cor_check_df, row.names = FALSE)
  flagged_cor <- cor_check_df[cor_check_df$flag == "⚠️ DROP", ]
  if (nrow(flagged_cor) > 0) {
    cat(sprintf("\n  ⚠️  %d scale(s) show r drop > 0.1 — review minpuc\n",
                nrow(flagged_cor)))
  } else {
    cat("\n  ✓ Within-scale correlations preserved across all scales\n")
  }
  cat("\n")
  write.csv(cor_check_df, "imputation_scale_correlation_check.csv",
            row.names = FALSE)
  cat("  ✓ Saved: imputation_scale_correlation_check.csv\n\n")
}

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PART E: RECALCULATE DERIVED VARIABLES
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PART E: RECALCULATING DERIVED VARIABLES\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

cat("Recalculating for all", imp_params$optimal_m, "imputed datasets...\n\n")

# ── E1. n_health_conditions ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("E1. n_health_conditions\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")

for (i in seq_along(all_imp_list)) {
  d <- all_imp_list[[i]]
  if (all(c("n_physical_conditions","n_ment_conditions","n_sleep_conditions")
          %in% names(d))) {
    all_imp_list[[i]]$n_health_conditions <-
      d$n_physical_conditions + d$n_ment_conditions + d$n_sleep_conditions
  }
}

d1        <- all_imp_list[[1]]
n_correct <- sum(
  d1$n_health_conditions ==
    (d1$n_physical_conditions + d1$n_ment_conditions + d1$n_sleep_conditions),
  na.rm = TRUE)

if (n_correct == nrow(d1)) {
  cat("  ✓ n_health_conditions correct in all", nrow(d1),
      "rows (imputation 1)\n\n")
} else {
  cat("  ⚠️  Mismatch in", nrow(d1) - n_correct, "rows — investigate\n\n")
}

# ── E2. bzra_weekly_diazepam_eq ───────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("E2. bzra_weekly_diazepam_eq\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
cat("  Recalculating as bzra_daily_diazepam_eq × 7\n")
cat("  This fills the 10 NAs from confirmed users with missing dose/freq\n")
cat("  using the imputed daily values, preserving the mathematical\n")
cat("  relationship between the two dose variables.\n\n")

for (i in seq_along(all_imp_list)) {
  d <- all_imp_list[[i]]
  if ("bzra_daily_diazepam_eq" %in% names(d)) {
    all_imp_list[[i]]$bzra_weekly_diazepam_eq <- d$bzra_daily_diazepam_eq * 7
  }
}

n_na_weekly <- sum(is.na(all_imp_list[[1]]$bzra_weekly_diazepam_eq))
n_na_daily  <- sum(is.na(all_imp_list[[1]]$bzra_daily_diazepam_eq))

if (n_na_weekly == 0) {
  cat("  ✓ bzra_weekly_diazepam_eq: no NAs remaining\n")
} else {
  cat(sprintf("  ⚠️  %d NAs remaining in bzra_weekly_diazepam_eq\n",
              n_na_weekly))
}
if (n_na_daily == 0) {
  cat("  ✓ bzra_daily_diazepam_eq: no NAs remaining (correctly imputed)\n")
} else {
  cat(sprintf("  ⚠️  %d NAs remaining in bzra_daily_diazepam_eq\n",
              n_na_daily))
}
cat("\n")

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PART F: ADD OUTCOME VARIABLE BACK
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PART F: ADDING OUTCOME VARIABLE BACK\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

if (file.exists("SIMOA_analysis.rds")) {
  SIMOA_original <- readRDS("SIMOA_analysis.rds")

  # Use the outcome stored directly in imp_params
  outcome_var <- imp_params$outcome
  if (is.null(outcome_var)) outcome_var <- "freq_dich"  # safe fallback

  if (outcome_var %in% names(SIMOA_original)) {
    outcome_data <- SIMOA_original[[outcome_var]]

    for (i in seq_along(all_imp_list))
      all_imp_list[[i]][[outcome_var]] <- outcome_data

    cat("✓ Outcome variable added:", outcome_var, "\n")
    cat("  Distribution (freq_dich: 0/1=stoppers, 2=continuers):\n")
    print(table(all_imp_list[[1]][[outcome_var]], useNA = "ifany"))
    cat("\n")
  } else {
    cat("⚠️  Outcome variable", outcome_var,
        "not found in original dataset\n\n")
  }
} else {
  cat("⚠️  SIMOA_analysis.rds not found — outcome not added\n\n")
}

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PART G: SAVE OUTPUTS
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("PART G: SAVING OUTPUTS\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

saveRDS(imp_final,    "mice_imputation_object.rds")
saveRDS(all_imp_list, "imputed_datasets_final.rds")

cat("✓ Saved: mice_imputation_object.rds\n")
cat("  (mids object — use with mice::pool() for analysis)\n")
cat("✓ Saved: imputed_datasets_final.rds\n")
cat("  (List of", length(all_imp_list),
    "complete datasets with all variables)\n\n")

cat("VARIABLES IN EACH IMPUTED DATASET:\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
cat(sprintf("  Total variables: %d\n", ncol(all_imp_list[[1]])))
cat(sprintf("  Includes: outcome (%s), derived vars, all imputed vars\n\n",
            if (!is.null(imp_params$outcome)) imp_params$outcome else "freq_dich"))

# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# PART H: FINAL SUMMARY
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("IMPUTATION COMPLETE — SUMMARY\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")

cat("IMPUTATION SPECIFICATIONS:\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")
cat("  Observations:         ", nrow(df_imp), "\n")
cat("  Variables imputed:    ", imp_params$n_vars_to_impute, "\n")
cat("  m (imputations):      ", imp_params$optimal_m, "\n")
cat("  maxit (iterations):   ", imp_params$optimal_maxit, "\n")
cat("  Ridge penalty:        ", imp_params$ridge_penalty, "\n")
cat("  Time elapsed:         ",
    round(as.numeric(elapsed_time), 2), "minutes\n\n")

cat("IMPUTATION METHODS:\n")
cat(sprintf("  PMM (continuous):    %d\n", sum(imp_params$method == "pmm")))
cat(sprintf("  Logreg (binary):     %d\n", sum(imp_params$method == "logreg")))
cat(sprintf("  Polr (ordered):      %d\n", sum(imp_params$method == "polr")))
cat(sprintf("  Polyreg (unordered): %d\n", sum(imp_params$method == "polyreg")))
cat(sprintf("  Not imputed:         %d\n\n", sum(imp_params$method == "")))

cat("STATISTICAL VERIFICATION SUMMARY:\n")
cat("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n")

if (!is.null(psrf_final)) {
  psrf_clean2 <- psrf_final[!is.na(psrf_final) & is.finite(psrf_final)]
  conv_status <- if (max(psrf_clean2) < 1.1) "✓ PASS" else "⚠️  FAIL"
  cat(sprintf("  B1. Convergence (PSRF):          %s  max=%.4f mean=%.4f\n",
              conv_status, max(psrf_clean2), mean(psrf_clean2)))
}

comp_status <- if (length(completeness_fails) == 0) "✓ PASS" else "⚠️  FAIL"
cat(sprintf("  D1. Completeness:                %s\n", comp_status))

range_status <- if (length(range_fails) == 0) "✓ PASS" else "⚠️  REVIEW"
cat(sprintf("  D2. PMM range preservation:      %s\n", range_status))

if (nrow(quality_df) > 0) {
  smd_status <- if (sum(quality_df$flag == "⚠️ REVIEW") == 0) "✓ PASS" else
    sprintf("⚠️  %d vars flagged", sum(quality_df$flag == "⚠️ REVIEW"))
  cat(sprintf("  D3. Mean/SD (|SMD| ≤ 0.5):       %s\n", smd_status))
}

if (nrow(riv_df) > 0) {
  riv_status <- if (sum(riv_df$flag == "⚠️ HIGH B", na.rm = TRUE) == 0)
    "✓ PASS" else
    sprintf("⚠️  %d vars flagged",
            sum(riv_df$flag == "⚠️ HIGH B", na.rm = TRUE))
  cat(sprintf("  D4. Between-imputation variance: %s\n", riv_status))
}

if (nrow(fmi_df) > 0)
  cat(sprintf("  D5. FMI (median / max):          %.3f / %.3f\n",
              median(fmi_df$FMI, na.rm = TRUE),
              max(fmi_df$FMI, na.rm = TRUE)))

if (nrow(cat_check_df) > 0) {
  cat_status <- if (nrow(flagged_cat) == 0) "✓ PASS" else
    sprintf("⚠️  %d vars flagged", nrow(flagged_cat))
  cat(sprintf("  D6. Categorical proportions:     %s\n", cat_status))
}

if (nrow(cor_check_df) > 0) {
  cor_status <- if (nrow(cor_check_df[cor_check_df$flag == "⚠️ DROP", ]) == 0)
    "✓ PASS" else "⚠️  REVIEW"
  cat(sprintf("  D7. Intra-scale correlations:    %s\n", cor_status))
}

cat("\n")
cat("LOGGED EVENTS:\n")
if (n_logged == 0) {
  cat("  ✓ None — imputation completed cleanly\n\n")
} else {
  cat(sprintf("  ⚠️  %d events — review imputation_logged_events.csv\n\n",
              n_logged))
}

cat("FILES CREATED:\n")
cat("  1.  mice_imputation_object.rds\n")
cat("  2.  imputed_datasets_final.rds\n")
cat("  3.  convergence_trace_plots_final.pdf\n")
cat("  4.  imputation_density_plots.pdf\n")
cat("  5.  imputation_stripplots.pdf\n")
cat("  6.  final_imputation_psrf.csv\n")
cat("  7.  imputation_quality_assessment.csv\n")
cat("  8.  imputation_variance_decomposition.csv\n")
cat("  9.  imputation_fmi_per_variable.csv\n")
cat("  10. imputation_categorical_check.csv\n")
cat("  11. imputation_scale_correlation_check.csv\n")
if (n_logged > 0)
  cat("  12. imputation_logged_events.csv\n")

cat("\n")
cat("NEXT STEPS:\n")
cat("  1. Review convergence_trace_plots_final.pdf\n")
cat("  2. Review imputation_density_plots.pdf\n")
cat("  3. Check imputation_quality_assessment.csv (flag |SMD| > 0.5)\n")
cat("  4. Check imputation_scale_correlation_check.csv\n")
cat("  5. If all checks pass → Proceed to Chunk 9 (composites + analysis)\n\n")

cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n")
cat("✓ MULTIPLE IMPUTATION COMPLETE\n")
cat("═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════\n\n")
```
